meaning: n.行军,步伐,进行曲vi.进军,前进vt.使行军,使行进n.(March)三月(略作Mar)
examples: The enemy are on the march.
We went skiing in France in March.
Our list consists of no-load diversified U.S. equity funds with the best records since March 2000.
Presidential hopefuls have already begun visiting the town: John McCain made a stop on March 17.
